title: Associate/ Senior Associate - Vessel Accounts
description:
We are looking for a dedicated Associate/ Senior Associate - Vessel Accounts for one of our global shipping clients. The individual will join the Ship Management Department in a role that combines finance with administrative coordination. This position offers the opportunity to work closely with vessel managers and contribute to the smooth operation of our marine activities

Responsibilities

• Assist in the preparation of full spectrum of vessel accounting

• Undertake marine accounting work, creating AP, AR and GL and provide support in preparing vessel expenses report which includes generating monthly and quarterly settlement reports from the system

• Review the monthly expenses invoice to ensure the cost incurred are properly charged according to the budget allocation

• Monitor and review the procurement supply from vessel managers

• Coordinate with vessel managers in preparation for contracts

• Assist with the preparation of the marine insurance renewal and termination

• Process insurance invoice and maintain the records

• Assist all necessary documents for audit purpose

• Take minutes for ongoing project meetings

• Other administrative ad-hoc duties as assigned

Requirements

• Minimum Diploma (or Degree) in Accounting, Maritime Studies, Business Administration, Data Management or a related discipline (preferred)

• Minimum 2 years of working experience in shipping or ship management companies handling vessel expenses or accounting matters

• Strong proficiency in all Microsoft Office applications

• Willingness to work overtime when necessary (i.e. during monthly closing)

• Independent and meticulous

• Good team player with positive working attitude

Interested applicants, please send your CV and your contact details to talentagent@innergy-consulting.com. We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
We provide specialized maritime, IT, HR and office professional headhunting services with a personal touch to both our clients and candidates and help connect them together.


At Innergy, we strive to be the leading maritime and shipping recruitment firm to source and deliver energetic and passionate talent who aspire to make a difference in their work for companies that recognise that people are their greatest assets.


Please visit our website at www.innergy-consulting.com to know more about us.
